pages.title: Going Crazy (Hiligaynon Fusion Mix)
pages.tagline: Ignite your speakers with chaotic K-pop rock fusion.

pages.body: Step into a volatile world where love and hate dance in the city's neon glow. This high-energy alternative rock track captures the desperate addiction of a relationship spinning out of control. From confused awakenings to cataclysmic releases, every note tells a story of intense desire and emotional chaos. The polished mix delivers intimate vocal details alongside dense harmonies that build tension until they finally burn it all up. Experience the raw honesty of falling through the cracks while rising again in this dramatic journey.
pages.styleSentence: A high-energy alternative rock K-pop fusion track at 148 BPM featuring tightly edited saturated guitars with precise double-tracking, a polished drum sound layered with samples and controlled room ambience, focused side-chained synth bass for clean low-end, and a glossy modern vocal mix that emphasizes intimate details on the passionate female lead while delivering expressive male rap-sung sections within densely stacked harmonies.

pages.vocalStyle: Passionate female lead with wide emotional range and dynamic swells, mixed with clear enunciation on expressive male rap-sung sections.

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Sings wide emotional swells with passionate clarity.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Stacks dense harmonies to create a wall of sound.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking with precise, layered beats.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds controlled room ambience and rhythmic texture.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Delivers clean low-end via focused side-chained synth.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Weaves atmospheric pads beneath the chaotic melody.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Layers gritty noise to heighten urban intensity.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Plays tightly edited saturated riffs with precision.

levels.name: CHAOS AWAKENS
levels.emotion: Confused awakening, sudden realization of chaos.

levels.name: RAW HONESTY HEAT
levels.emotion: Raw honesty in the heat of the moment.
